description: Canonical sources for the weekly cursor-feature-scout briefing. Add/remove URLs here to change what the skill tracks; do not hardcode sources in the SKILL.md.

intuit_ecosystem.finriskai: watch finriskai-agent-all channel for lending/risk AI skill shipments

tracked_capabilities.name: Live editing in HTML pages
tracked_capabilities.risk_relevance: MBR presenter-mode decks and interactive risk dashboards can be edited inline during team reviews instead of regenerating from source. Directly useful for fnpl-mbr-slide9 viewer.

tracked_capabilities.name: Inline commenting in HTML
tracked_capabilities.risk_relevance: Per-slide or per-section feedback on MBR drafts without leaving the artifact; removes the round-trip to Google Docs for comments.

tracked_capabilities.name: Dashboard-level HTML capabilities
tracked_capabilities.risk_relevance: Replaces static screenshots with live filterable views in team-docs. Enables interactive DPD30+ / cohort drill-downs shared via URL instead of screenshots.

tracked_capabilities.name: New MCPs relevant to risk analytics
tracked_capabilities.risk_relevance: Expands the surface of data and tools our agents can reach. Priority signals: Databricks, Tableau, Camunda, Atlassian, DDE, GitHub, Glean, Slack MCP updates.

tracked_capabilities.name: New Cursor chat / compose features
tracked_capabilities.risk_relevance: Affects how we structure prompts and multi-turn workflows. Background agents could enable unattended cohort QC / overnight scans.

tracked_capabilities.name: New Claude Code modes
tracked_capabilities.risk_relevance: Determines when we use Claude Code vs Cursor for different task types. Installable skills (npx pattern) affect how we package risk skills.
